text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Check it out, Trainer! I, Kitasan Black, have grown some mean biceps!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Go ahead, grab on! I can lift you up, easy!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I definitely won't drop you! In fact,
I'll even carry you wherever you want!
